class LinkedList:
    def __init__(s): s.head=None
    def append(s,d):

        c=s.head
        while c.next: c=c.next

        r=[]; c=s.head

def kmp(text,pat):
    n,m=len(text),len(pat)
    if m==0: return 0
    lps=[0]*m; j=0
    for i in range(1,m):
        while j>0 and pat[i]!=pat[j]: j=lps[j-1]
        if pat[i]==pat[j]: j+=1; lps[i]=j
    j=0
    for i in range(n):
        while j>0 and text[i]!=pat[j]: j=lps[j-1]
        if text[i]==pat[j]: j+=1
        if j==m: return i-m+1
    return -1

def rk(text,pat):
    n,m=len(text),len(pat)
    if m==0: return 0
    d,q=256,101; h=pow(d,m-1,q); p=t=0
    for i in range(m): p=(d*p+ord(pat[i]))%q; t=(d*t+ord(text[i]))%q
    for i in range(n-m+1):
        if p==t and text[i:i+m]==pat: return i
        if i<n-m: t=(d*(t-ord(text[i])*h)+ord(text[i+m]))%q
    return -1

    t,b,l,r=0,n-1,0,n-1; d=1
    while t<=b and l<=r:
        for i in range(l,r+1): m[t][i]=d; d+=1
        t+=1
        for i in range(t,b+1): m[i][r]=d; d+=1
        r-=1
